title: nf-scatac pipeline parameters
description: Single-Cell ATAC-seq Allelic Imbalance Pipeline with WASP2

input_output_options.title: Input/Output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to samplesheet CSV file containing sample information.
input.help_text: The samplesheet must contain sample metadata and paths to fragment files or BAM files.

outdir.description: The output directory where results will be saved.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. Options: 'symlink', 'rellink', 'link', 'copy', 'copyNoFollow', 'move'.

variant_options.title: Variant data options
variant_options.description: Variant data required for WASP2 allelic analysis.

vcf.description: Path to VCF/BCF/PGEN variant file with sample genotypes.
vcf.help_text: Required for WASP2 mapping bias correction and allelic imbalance analysis.

scatac_processing_options.title: Single-cell processing options
scatac_processing_options.description: Options for single-cell ATAC-seq quality filtering and processing.

min_fragments_per_cell.description: Minimum fragments per cell to include in analysis.
min_fragments_per_cell.help_text: Cells with fewer fragments than this threshold will be excluded.

min_cells_per_snp.description: Minimum cells per SNP for pseudo-bulk aggregation.
min_cells_per_snp.help_text: SNPs covered by fewer cells will be excluded from pseudo-bulk analysis.

min_count.description: Minimum allele count for imbalance testing.
min_count.help_text: Variants with fewer than this many total reads will be excluded from statistical testing.

pseudocount.help_text: Added to allele counts to stabilize ratio estimates.

output_format_options.title: Output format options
output_format_options.description: Configure output file formats for downstream analysis.

create_zarr.description: Also output Zarr format for GenVarLoader compatibility.
create_zarr.help_text: Creates Zarr arrays suitable for use with GenVarLoader and other ML frameworks.

skip_pseudobulk.help_text: If enabled, only single-cell level results will be produced.

output_format.description: ML output formats (comma-separated): zarr, parquet, anndata.
output_format.help_text: Specify multiple formats separated by commas for ML-ready outputs.

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.

custom_config_base.description: Base URL for loading nf-core custom config profiles.

custom_config_version.description: Git tag/branch for nf-core custom config profiles.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime.

tracedir.description: Directory to keep pipeline Nextflow trace, timeline, report, and DAG files.
